calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify Charitable Purpose Of Institutional Fund
Off Calendar Nov-17-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ryan Cunningham appeared by zoom for Petitioner.

The Court noted that no one was present today to object to the granting of this petition and that the Attorney General's Office signed off on the amended request. The Court also read the language of the proposed order that was submitted. The Petition to Modify Charitable Purpose of Institutional Fund is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
